_comment: Example shape for PILOT_CATALOG_FILE (seed-catalog.ts). NOT real pilot data — export the curated ~50-100 rows from index_demo.xlsx into a file of this shape (do NOT commit the real file). Per Golden-Catalog decisions: name cleaned of marker glyphs; category is flat; price is a DecimalAmount string numeric(19,4); skus are internal Material codes (incl. 10-digit); barcodes MUST be 12/13/14-digit numeric (the ~5 qualifying rows). tax_category is forced to 'standard' by the script; no stock; RX encoded in name/category only.
